title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 334.190 - Practice of midwifery limited
text:
334.190.  Practice of midwifery limited. — It is unlawful for any person licensed as a midwife only to engage in any other branch of medical practice or to advertise herself as doctor, doctress or physician or to use any letters before or after her name on a sign or otherwise, indicating that she is authorized to or does engage in any other branch of medical practice.
(RSMo 1939 § 9993, A.L. 1945 p. 1154, A.L. 1959 S.B. 50 § 17) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9123; 1919 § 7339; 1909 § 8320 
Certified midwives, services related to pregnancy permitted, when, 376.1753
